title: Toms Server Additions: Decorations & Furniture
description: Server-side decorations and furniture, comes with its own workbench block! No client side mods required!
body:
# This mod will no longer be updated on modrinth!
# See https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/tsa-decorations for the latest version!


![Toms Server Additions: Decoration & Furniture](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/DLsxkJLC/images/0c9ce626541bbd8073bef3333efb8079c1727734.png)

This mod adds a variety of decorations and furniture to your server / world.

Enjoy over **200+** different furniture pieces, from benches and chairs you can sit on, to tables, shelves in which you can place items and blocks, dressers, cabinets and many more!

![example 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/DLsxkJLC/images/ef28a2beebbfb9c8b19ced0568937483a5e42287.png)

This mod is server-side (but also works in single-player). 
Clients joining the server won't need to have the mod installed

The mod comes with a **Carpentry Table**, which is used to craft most of the furniture.

Other decorative items are crafted using the vanilla crafting table.

You might want to join my discord server for suggestions, early previews and updates or bug reports: [![discord invite](https://img.shields.io/badge/discord-label?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&logoColor=%23ffffff&labelColor=%237289da&color=%237289da)
](https://discord.gg/9X6w2kfy89)


---

### Carpentry Table
You can craft the Carpentry Table using any wooden logs in a crafting table.

---

### Crafting

- **Nails**:  
  Crafted using iron ingots and netherite scrap.\
  Main ingredient for most furniture

- **Cut Oak/Birch/etc. Planks**:  
  Crafted using 2 normal planks of any wood type in the carpentry table.\
  Another main ingredient for furniture.

To see all available recipes, install Polydex by patbox.

![image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/DLsxkJLC/images/e49b3b2ee4f011afc79f1d9e88b2048a2914aeff.png)
